name: Improved lower bounds for the Shannon capacity of odd cycles
summary: arXiv:2607.21517v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The Shannon capacity $\Theta(G)$ of a graph $G$ quantifies the maximum rate at which information can be transmitted with zero error over a noisy ch...
description: arXiv:2607.21517v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The Shannon capacity $\Theta(G)$ of a graph $G$ quantifies the maximum rate at which information can be transmitted with zero error over a noisy channel. It is lower bounded by $\alpha(G^d)^{1/d}$ for any $d$, where $\alpha(G^d)$ is the independence number of the $d$-th strong power of $G$. We construct independent sets of size $134753$ in $C_7^...
author: Nathaniel Itty, Christopher D. Rosin, Chase Carstensen, Daniel Reichman
